instruction: This is a scanned mixed-layout page. Perform region-based OCR: 1. Detect table-like regions and extract as structured JSON. 2. Detect graph/diagram regions and extract as structured JSON. 3. Detect handwritten annotations and extract separately. 4. Extract body text. Merge them back in approximate reading order.
